full_text:
Wang Li 王立
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Li (王立). Court astrologer and Emperor Xian’s teacher, foretold the Han would be replaced by Wei. Wang Li was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
